{{nihongo|'''Miwa Shrine'''|三輪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8220005006995 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Miwa Shrine|lt=Miwa Shrine|WD=Q135040290}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '石川県河北郡津幡町字北中条サのニの2', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '石川県河北郡津幡町北中条', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:三輪神社 (津幡町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11357406}} == Japanese content == {{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '石川県河北郡津幡町字北中条サのニの2', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '石川県河北郡津幡町北中条', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:三輪神社 (津幡町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11357406}} == Japanese content == {{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]]

street address (P6375) == * {'text': '石川県河北郡津幡町字北中条サのニの2', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '石川県河北郡津幡町北中条', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:三輪神社 (津幡町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11357406}} == Japanese content == {{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]

{{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

{{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

'''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === {{otheruses|石川県河北郡津幡町にある三輪神社|その他の三輪神社|{{jalink|三輪神社 (曖昧さ回避)||三輪神社}}}} {{神社 |名称 = 三輪神社 |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条サのニの2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大物主命}}、他7柱 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|承和|Q3577279}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月15日|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''三輪神社'''（みわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|河北郡|Q1130942}}{{jalink|津幡町|Q432014}}字北中条にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|津幡駅|Q3701490}}裏手の山中に鎮座する。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|大物主命}}・{{jalink|菊理媛神|Q11619891}}・{{jalink|経津主命}}・{{jalink|武甕槌神}}・{{jalink|天児屋根命}}・{{jalink|比売神|Q22070227}}・{{jalink|倉稲魂命}}・{{jalink|大山咋命}}の8柱を祀る。 === 由緒 === 創祀は{{jalink|承和 (日本)|Q1075605|承和}}3年（{{jalink|836年|Q24957}}）といい、『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』の{{jalink|加賀郡 (加賀国)||加賀国加賀郡}}の小社「三輪神社」であるとされる{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}としてもう1社、{{jalink|金沢市|Q191130}}の{{jalink|石浦神社|Q11586806}}がある。。境内には龍神之池と名づけられた池がある。 ===交通=== * {{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125}}（JR西日本）・{{jalink|IRいしかわ鉄道|Q11585936}}津幡駅から徒歩10分 === 脚注 === {{reflist}} ===参考文献=== * 石川県神社庁編『石川県神社誌』、石川県神社庁、昭和51年10月26日 === 外部リンク === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社]（石川県神社庁） {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{jalink|Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}{{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}{{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}, former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{jalink|836|Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 15|Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{jalink|Tsubata|Q432014}}, {{jalink|Kahoku District|Q1130942}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{jalink|Tsubata Station|Q3701490}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{jalink|Ōmononushi|Q867534|Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Kukurihime|Q11619891|Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Futsunushi|Q21391580|Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Takemikazuchi-no-Kami}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Himegami|Q22070227}}, {{jalink|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{jalink|836|Q24957}} ({{jalink|Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{jalink|Kaga Province|Q864166}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Another candidate {{jalink|ronsha|Q135022904}} is {{jalink|Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806}} in {{jalink|Kanazawa|Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125}} (JR West) and {{jalink|IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||WD=|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill||lt=former shrine rank|UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill||lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill||lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill||lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill||lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||WD=|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)||WD=|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|WD=|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q2564508}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q2564508}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q2564508}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q2564508}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{otheruses|Miwa Shrine in Tsubata, Kahoku District, Ishikawa Prefecture|other Miwa Shrines|{{ill|lt=Miwa Shrine (disambiguation)|UNKNOWN|lt=Miwa Shrine}}}} {{神社 |名称 = Miwa Shrine |画像 = [[画像:MIwajinja-tubata.jpg|250px]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}{{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}{{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}} Aza Kitanakajō Sa-no-2-no-2 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, plus seven other deities |社格 = candidate for {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}, former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = tradition: {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} (Jōwa 3) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 15|Q2497|WD=Q2497}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Miwa Shrine''' (みわじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Aza Kitanakajō, {{ill|lt=Tsubata|Q432014|WD=Q432014}}, {{ill|lt=Kahoku District|Q1130942|WD=Q1130942}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. It stands in the hills behind {{ill|lt=Tsubata Station|Q3701490|WD=Q3701490}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deities === It enshrines eight deities: {{ill|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi|Q867534|WD=Q867534|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kukurihime|Q11619891|WD=Q11619891|lt=Kukurihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi|Q21391580|WD=Q21391580|WD=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q2564508}}, {{ill|lt=Himegami|Q22070227|WD=Q22070227}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Origin === Its founding is said to be {{ill|lt=836|Q24957|WD=Q24957}} ({{ill|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|Q1075605|WD=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa}} 3), and it is considered the minor shrine "Miwa Shrine" in Kaga District, {{ill|lt=Kaga Province|Q864166|WD=Q864166}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Another candidate {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} is {{ill|lt=Ishiura Shrine|Q11586806|WD=Q11586806}} in {{ill|lt=Kanazawa|Q191130|WD=Q191130}}.. There is a pond in the precincts called Ryūjin-no-Ike. === Access === * 10 minutes on foot from Tsubata Station on {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125}} (JR West) and {{ill|lt=IR Ishikawa Railway|Q11585936|WD=Q11585936}} === Notes === {{reflist}} ===References=== * Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office (ed.), ''Ishikawa-ken Jinja-shi'', Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office, October 26, 1976 === External links === *[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0931/ 三輪神社] (Ishikawa Prefectural Shrine Office) {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みわしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:石川県の旧村社]] [[Category:津幡町の建築物]] [[Category:津幡町の歴史]] [[Category:三輪神社]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QMiwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Miwa Shrine (Q11357406)}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]
